description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem owners. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = aownerreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the owner subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem owners to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the owner quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all owners in the working case.
valid owner subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem owners with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem owners with any equipment (ac buses, loads, machines, ac branches, FACTS devices, VSC dc lines and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Total active power load on the owner’s buses, in MW.
Total reactive power load on the owner’s buses, in Mvar.
Total active power load of the owner’s loads, in MW.
Total reactive power load of the owner’s loads, in Mvar.
Total active power generation on the owner’s buses, in Mw.
Total reactive power generation on the owner’s buses, in Mvar.
Total active power generation on the owner’s machines, in MW.
Total reactive power generation on the owner’s machines, in Mvar.
Total active power losses assigned to the owner, in MW.
Total reactive power losses assigned to the owner, in Mvar.
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner, in MW.
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner, in MVar.
Total active power load on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total active power load of the owner’s loads (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load of the owner’s loads (units determined by power output option).
Total active power generation on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power generation on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total active power generation on the owner’s machines (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power generation on the owner’s machines (units determined by power output option).
Total active power losses assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power losses assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
